ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speech_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech signal recording */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio signal file */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the speech signal in seconds */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the audio signal */,
  "bit_resolution" INTEGER /* Bit resolution of the audio signal */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acoustic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding speech signal */,
  "time" REAL /* Time (in seconds) of the feature extraction */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the signal at the specified time */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the signal at the specified time */,
  "formant1" REAL /* First formant frequency */,
  "formant2" REAL /* Second formant frequency */,
  "formant3" REAL /* Third formant frequency */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter ( Cycle-to-cycle variation in pitch) */,
  "shimmer" REAL /* Shimmer (Cycle-to-cycle variation in intensity) */,
  "spectral_centroid" REAL /* Spectral centroid (a measure of spectral brightness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_features_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES speech_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_analysis_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech signal being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_analysis_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_analysis_sessions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES speech_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated speech signal */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the audio file */,
  "channels" INTEGER /* Number of audio channels */,
  "encoding" TEXT /* Encoding of the audio file (e.g., PCM, MP3) */,
  "duration_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Duration of the audio file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_metadata_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES speech_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES speech_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES voice_analysis_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech signal */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES speech_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., audio, text) */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
